meta.title: NovaLayer — Ship interfaces faster
meta.description: Design-to-code workflow tools for product teams. Pixel-ready layouts, accessible components, and performance-minded defaults.

hero.heading: Turn design intent into production-ready pages
hero.subheading: Semantic structure, responsive layouts, and accessible interactions—without sacrificing speed or polish.

image.alt: Abstract UI composition suggesting layout blocks and a grid

trustedBy.heading: Trusted by teams who care about craft

features.heading: Everything you need to ship with confidence
features.subheading: Composable sections, JSON-driven content, and a layout tuned for clarity across breakpoints.

items.title: Semantic HTML
items.body: Landmarks, headings, and labels that make sense to users and assistive tech.

items.title: Responsive by default
items.body: Mobile layouts are authored without a dedicated Figma frame—fluid grids and sensible stacking.

items.title: Performance-aware
items.body: Preconnect hints, deferred scripts, and image dimensions to keep CLS and LCP in check.

cta.heading: Ready to align pixels with production?
cta.body: Drop this template into CodeIgniter, wire your JSON, and iterate with your design file side-by-side.

footer.tagline: Built with CodeIgniter 4, Bootstrap 5, and structured content.
footer.finePrint: © 2026 NovaLayer. Assignment demo — replace with real content.
